title: Office native formats are required when document fidelity matters
summary: CSV is acceptable only for simple tabular interchange. XLSX, DOCX, PPTX and PDF must be preferred when preserving formulas, formatting, layout, tables, validation, metadata or visual fidelity matters.
facts: CSV does not preserve Office document fidelity.
Native Office formats should be preferred for fidelity-sensitive work.
M365/Graph and Office Scripts are HML-gated integrations.
inferences: HermesOps must not convert fidelity-sensitive Excel workbooks to CSV as a default workflow.
decisions: CSV is allowed only for simple staging/debug/interchange.
XLSX/DOCX/PPTX/PDF are preferred for corporate document fidelity.
Office Desktop automation is fallback-only and must be interactive/approved.
rollback: Revert this memory item and related documentation if corporate policy changes.
